content: Self-Refine's iterative no-external-supervision refinement framework can be repurposed to unify fragmented LLM self-reflection mechanisms by turning multi-perspective reflection into a layered self-feedback loop, where each iteration of self-refinement aligns inconsistent reflection perspectives to produce higher-quality outputs. This creates a modular reflection framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data while leveraging the robustness of multiple reflection perspectives.
